description:
# Configure sync direction & document series

Decide what flows where, and what naming series to use.

**Order Sync (always on, Shopify → Nexus):**

- **Sales Order Series** — required (e.g. `SO-SHOP-` or `SO-EG-.YYYY.-`).
- **Import Sales Invoice from Shopify if Payment is marked** — recommended ON. Requires **Sales Invoice Series**, **Cash/Bank Account**, **Cost Center**.
- **Import Delivery Notes from Shopify on Shipment** — recommended ON. Requires **Delivery Note Series**.

**Outbound Sync (opt-in, Nexus → Shopify):**

- **Update Nexus stock levels to Shopify** — periodic stock push (5/10/15/30/60 min cadence).
- **Upload new Nexus Items to Shopify** — auto-create Shopify products on Item save.
- **Update Shopify Item after updating Nexus item** — push price/name/description changes.

This step auto-completes once **Sales Order Series** is set.
name: Configure Sync Settings
title: Configure sync direction & series
